ogTitle: Boonoo Boonoo vs Booragul: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boonoo Boonoo and Booragul.
heading: Boonoo Boonoo vs Booragul — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boonoo Boonoo, New South Wales and Booragul, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boonoo Boonoo has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Booragul (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boonoo Boonoo or Booragul safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boonoo Boonoo has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Booragul scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boonoo Boonoo scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Booragul scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boonoo Boonoo or Booragul?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boonoo Boonoo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
